column2: label
SELECT c.c_name, c.c_phone, o.o_orderdate, o.o_totalprice FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey WHERE o.o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_acctbal, o.o_orderkey, o.o_totalprice, o.o_orderdate FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'F' AND o.o_totalprice > 100000 ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_acctbal, o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderstatus, o.o_orderdate FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey WHERE c.c_acctbal < 0 AND o.o_orderstatus = 'O' ORDER BY c.c_acctbal ASC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment, o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, o.o_totalprice FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey WHERE o.o_orderpriority = '5-LOW' AND o.o_orderdate > '1997-01-01' ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment, o.o_orderkey, o.o_totalprice, o.o_orderpriority FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'AUTOMOBILE'AND o.o_totalprice > 200000 ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_phone, o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, o.o_totalprice FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'P' AND o.o_shippriority = 0 ORDER BY o.o_orderdate ASC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment, o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderpriority, o.o_totalprice, o.o_orderdate FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' AND o.o_orderpriority = '2-HIGH'AND o.o_orderstatus = 'F' ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_acctbal, o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, o.o_totalprice FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey WHERE o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1995-12-31' ORDER BY o.o_orderdate ASC, o.o_totalprice DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_acctbal, c.c_mktsegment, o.o_orderkey, o.o_totalprice, o.o_orderpriority FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey WHERE c.c_acctbal > 8000 AND o.o_orderpriority = '3-MEDIUM' ORDER BY c.c_acctbal DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment, o.o_orderkey, o.o_totalprice, o.o_orderdate, o.o_orderstatus FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'HOUSEHOLD' AND o.o_orderstatus = 'F' AND o.o_totalprice < 20000 ORDER BY o.o_totalprice ASC;

SELECT EXTRACT (YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) AS an_comanda, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY EXTRACT (YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) ORDER BY an_comanda ASC;
SELECT l.l_shipmode, SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_cantitate FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY l.l_shipmode ORDER BY total_cantitate DESC;
SELECT o.o_orderpriority, SUM(l.l_discount) AS total_discount FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY o.o_orderpriority ORDER BY total_discount DESC;

SELECT l.l_linestatus, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS valoare_neta FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY l.l_linestatus ORDER BY valoare_neta DESC;
SELECT o.o_orderstatus, SUM(l.l_tax) AS total_taxe FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY total_taxe DESC;
SELECT l.l_shipinstruct, SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_cantitate FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY l.l_shipinstruct ORDER BY total_cantitate DESC;

SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.l_shipdate) AS an_expediere, EXTRACT (MONTH  FROM l.l_shipdate) AS luna_expediere, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY EXTRACT (YEAR FROM l.l_shipdate), EXTRACT (MONTH FROM l.l_shipdate) ORDER BY an_expediere ASC, luna_expediere ASC;

SELECT o.o_orderpriority, SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_valoare_finalizata FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'F' GROUP BY o.o_orderpriority ORDER BY total_valoare_finalizata DESC;

SELECT EXTRACT (YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) AS an_comanda, l.l_shipmode, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY EXTRACT (YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate), l.l_shipmode ORDER BY an_comanda ASC, total_facturat DESC;

SELECT l.l_shipmode, l.l_linestatus, SUM(l.l_discount) AS total_discount FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY l.l_shipmode, l.l_linestatus ORDER BY l.l_shipmode ASC, total_discount DESC;

SELECT EXTRACT (YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) AS an_comanda, COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS nr_comenzi FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY EXTRACT (YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) ORDER BY an_comanda ASC;
SELECT l.l_shipmode, COUNT(*) AS nr_linii FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY l.l_shipmode ORDER BY nr_linii DESC;
SELECT o.o_orderstatus, COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS nr_comenzi FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY nr_comenzi DESC;
SELECT o.o_orderpriority,COUNT(*) AS nr_linii FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY o.o_orderpriority ORDER BY nr_linii DESC;
SELECT l.l_linestatus,COUNT(*) AS nr_linii FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY l.l_linestatus;
SELECT l.l_shipinstruct, COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS nr_comenzi FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY l.l_shipinstruct ORDER BY nr_comenzi DESC;

SELECT EXTRACT (MONTH FROM l.l_shipdate) AS luna_expediere, COUNT(*) AS nr_linii FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY EXTRACT (MONTH FROM l.l_shipdate) ORDER BY luna_expediere ASC;

SELECT EXTRACT (YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) AS an_comanda, o.o_orderpriority, COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS nr_comenzi FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY EXTRACT (YEAR  FROM o.o_orderdate), o.o_orderpriority ORDER BY an_comanda ASC, nr_comenzi DESC;

SELECT l.l_shipmode, l.l_linestatus, COUNT(*) AS nr_linii FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY l.l_shipmode, l.l_linestatus ORDER BY l.l_shipmode ASC, nr_linii DESC;

SELECT o.o_orderstatus, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM l.l_shipdate) AS an_expediere, COUNT(*) AS nr_linii FROM orders o INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY o.o_orderstatus, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM l.l_shipdate) ORDER BY o.o_orderstatus ASC, an_expediere ASC;

SELECT s.s_name, s.s_nation_name, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nation_name HAVING SUM(l.l_extendedprice) > 500000 ORDER BY total_facturat DESC;

SELECT s.s_name, SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_cantitate FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING SUM(l.l_quantity) < 15000 ORDER BY total_cantitate ASC;

SELECT s.s_name, MIN(l.l_extendedprice) AS pret_minim_linie FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING MIN(l.l_extendedprice) < 2000 ORDER BY pret_minim_linie ASC;

SELECT s.s_name, MAX(l.l_extendedprice) AS pret_maxim_linie FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING MAX(l.l_extendedprice) > 100000 ORDER BY pret_maxim_linie DESC;

SELECT s.s_name,SUM(l.l_discount) AS total_discount FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING SUM(l.l_discount) > 10 ORDER BY total_discount DESC;
SELECT s.s_name,MAX(l.l_tax) AS taxa_maxima FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING MAX(l.l_tax) >= 0.08 ORDER BY taxa_maxima DESC;

SELECT s.s_name, MIN(l.l_quantity) AS cantitate_minima FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING MIN(l.l_quantity) < 2 ORDER BY cantitate_minima ASC;

SELECT s.s_name,SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS valoare_neta_totala FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) > 600000 ORDER BY valoare_neta_totala DESC;

SELECT s.s_name, MAX(l.l_quantity) AS cantitate_maxima FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING MAX(l.l_quantity) > 45 ORDER BY cantitate_maxima DESC;
SELECT s.s_name, SUM(l.l_tax) AS total_taxe FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING SUM(l.l_tax) < 50 ORDER BY total_taxe ASC;

SELECT s.s_name, MAX(l.l_extendedprice) AS pret_maxim_linie FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING MAX(l.l_extendedprice) < 90000 ORDER BY pret_maxim_linie DESC;

SELECT s.s_name, MIN(l.l_discount) AS discount_minim, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING MIN(l.l_discount) = 0 ORDER BY total_facturat DESC;

SELECT s.s_name, SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_cantitate FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING SUM(l.l_quantity) BETWEEN 10000 AND 20000 ORDER BY total_cantitate ASC;

SELECT s.s_name, MIN(l.l_extendedprice) AS pret_minim, MAX(l.l_extendedprice) AS pret_maxim,MAX(l.l_extendedprice) - MIN(l.l_extendedprice) AS spread_pret FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING MAX(l.l_extendedprice) - MIN(l.l_extendedprice) > 90000 ORDER BY spread_pret DESC;

SELECT s.s_name, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_returnat FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey WHERE l.l_returnflag = 'R' GROUP BY s.s_suppkey,s.s_name HAVING SUM(l.l_extendedprice) > 200000 ORDER BY total_returnat DESC;

SELECT s.s_name, MAX(l.l_quantity) AS cantitate_maxima_air FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey WHERE l.l_shipmode = 'AIR' GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING MAX(l.l_quantity) > 40 ORDER BY cantitate_maxima_air DESC;

SELECT s.s_name, MIN(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS valoare_neta_minima FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING MIN(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) < 1000 ORDER BY valoare_neta_minima ASC;

SELECT s.s_name, SUM(l.l_tax) AS total_taxe_finalizate FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey WHERE l.l_linestatus = 'F' GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING SUM(l.l_tax) > 10 ORDER BY total_taxe_finalizate DESC;

SELECT s.s_name, MAX(l.l_discount) AS discount_maxim,SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING MAX(l.l_discount) = 0.10 ORDER BY total_facturat DESC;

SELECT s.s_name, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat_truck FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey WHERE l.l_shipmode = 'TRUCK' GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING SUM(l.l_extendedprice) > 300000 ORDER BY total_facturat_truck DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment, o.o_orderdate, o.o_orderpriority, l.l_shipmode, l.l_extendedprice FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'AUTOMOBILE' AND o.o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' AND l.l_shipmode = 'AIR' ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC, l.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_acctbal, o.o_orderdate, o.o_totalprice, l.l_returnflag, l.l_extendedprice FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' AND o.o_orderstatus = 'F' AND l.l_returnflag = 'R' ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC, o.o_orderdate ASC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_phone, o.o_orderdate, o.o_orderpriority, l.l_shipmode, l.l_quantity FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'HOUSEHOLD' AND o.o_orderdate > '1997-01-01' AND l.l_shipmode = 'TRUCK' ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC, l.l_quantity DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_acctbal, o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderpriority, l.l_discount, l.l_extendedprice FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE c.c_acctbal > 7000 AND o.o_orderpriority = '2-HIGH' AND l.l_discount = 0.10 ORDER BY c.c_acctbal DESC, l.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment, o.o_orderdate, l.l_shipdate, l.l_linestatus, l.l_extendedprice FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'MACHINERY' AND l.l_linestatus = 'O' AND l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-12-31' ORDER BY l.l_shipdate ASC, l.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment, o.o_orderpriority, o.o_orderdate, l.l_shipmode, l.l_extendedprice FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE o.o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT', '2-HIGH') AND l.l_shipmode = 'RAIL' ORDER BY o.o_orderpriority ASC, o.o_orderdate DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment, o.o_orderdate, o.o_totalprice, l.l_quantity, l.l_shipmode FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'FURNITURE' AND l.l_quantity > 40 AND l.l_shipmode = 'SHIP' ORDER BY l.l_quantity DESC, o.o_totalprice DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_acctbal, o.o_orderdate, l.l_commitdate, l.l_receiptdate, l.l_extendedprice FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE l.l_linestatus = 'O'AND l.l_receiptdate > l.l_commitdate AND c.c_acctbal > 0 ORDER BY l.l_receiptdate DESC, l.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment,o.o_orderdate, o.o_totalprice,l.l_shipinstruct, l.l_tax FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'AUTOMOBILE' AND l.l_shipinstruct = 'DELIVER IN PERSON' AND l.l_tax = 0.08 ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC, o.o_orderdate ASC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_phone, o.o_totalprice, o.o_orderstatus, l.l_shipinstruct, l.l_extendedprice FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE o.o_totalprice > 150000 AND o.o_orderstatus = 'P' AND l.l_shipinstruct = 'NONE' ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC, l.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT s.s_name, COUNT(DISTINCT p.p_partkey) AS nr_piese FROM part p INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name ORDER BY nr_piese DESC;

SELECT p.p_type, COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS nr_furnizori FROM part p INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey GROUP BY p.p_type ORDER BY nr_furnizori DESC;

SELECT p.p_brand, s.s_name, COUNT(DISTINCT p.p_partkey) AS nr_piese FROM part p INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey GROUP BY p.p_brand, s.s_suppkey, s.s_name ORDER BY p.p_brand ASC, nr_piese DESC;

SELECT p.p_container, COUNT(*) AS nr_combinatii FROM part p INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey GROUP BY p.p_container ORDER BY nr_combinatii DESC;

SELECT p.p_size, COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS nr_furnizori FROM part p INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey GROUP BY p.p_size ORDER BY p.p_size ASC;

SELECT p.p_mfgr, s.s_name, COUNT(DISTINCT p.p_partkey) AS nr_piese FROM part p INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey GROUP BY p.p_mfgr, s.s_suppkey, s.s_name ORDER BY p.p_mfgr ASC, nr_piese DESC;

SELECT p.p_brand, COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS nr_furnizori FROM part p INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE p.p_type LIKE '%BRASS%' GROUP BY p.p_brand ORDER BY nr_furnizori DESC;

SELECT s.s_name,COUNT(DISTINCT p.p_partkey) AS nr_piese_mici FROM part p INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE p.p_size <= 5 GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name ORDER BY nr_piese_mici DESC;

SELECT s.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, COUNT(DISTINCT p.p_brand) AS nr_branduri,COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS nr_furnizori FROM part p INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_nation_name ORDER BY nr_furnizori DESC;

SELECT s.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, p.p_container, COUNT(DISTINCT p.p_partkey) AS nr_piese FROM part p INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_region_name, p.p_container ORDER BY s.s_region_name ASC, nr_piese DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE EXTRACT (YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) = 1996 GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment ORDER BY total_facturat DESC;

SELECT c.c_mktsegment, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS valoare_neta_totala FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY c.c_mktsegment ORDER BY valoare_neta_totala DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_acctbal,SUM(l.l_tax) AS total_taxe FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'AUTOMOBILE' GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_acctbal ORDER BY total_taxe DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, l.l_shipmode, SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_cantitate FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name, l.l_shipmode ORDER BY c.c_name ASC, total_cantitate DESC;

SELECT c.c_mktsegment, o.o_orderstatus, SUM(l.l_discount) AS total_discount FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY c.c_mktsegment, o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY c.c_mktsegment ASC, total_discount DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_returnat FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE l.l_returnflag = 'R' GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment ORDER BY total_returnat DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) AS an_comanda, SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_valoare_urgenta FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE o.o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) ORDER BY an_comanda ASC, total_valoare_urgenta DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, l.l_shipmode, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS valoare_neta FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE l.l_linestatus = 'F' GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name, l.l_shipmode ORDER BY valoare_neta DESC;

SELECT c.c_mktsegment, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM l.l_shipdate) AS an_expediere, SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_cantitate, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY c.c_mktsegment,EXTRACT (YEAR FROM l.l_shipdate) ORDER BY c.c_mktsegment ASC, an_expediere ASC;

SELECT c.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, o.o_orderpriority, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY c.c_nation_name, o.o_orderpriority ORDER BY c.c_nation_name ASC, total_facturat DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_cheltuit FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' GROUP BY c.c_name HAVING SUM(l.l_extendedprice) > 500000;

SELECT s.s_name, SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS stoc_total_cupru FROM supplier s INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE p.p_type LIKE '%COPPER%' GROUP BY s.s_name HAVING SUM(ps.ps_availqty) > 8000;

SELECT c.c_name, COUNT(l.l_linenumber) AS numar_linii_comanda FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'AUTOMOBILE' GROUP BY c.c_name HAVING COUNT(l.l_linenumber) > 50;

SELECT s.s_name, COUNT(ps.ps_partkey) AS piese_oferite FROM supplier s INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE p.p_brand = 'Brand#11' GROUP BY s.s_name HAVING COUNT(ps.ps_partkey) > 10;

SELECT c.c_name, SUM(l.l_quantity) AS cantitate_totala FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'F' GROUP BY c.c_name HAVING SUM(l.l_quantity) > 1000;

SELECT s.s_name, SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS cost_aprovizionare FROM supplier s INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE p.p_size < 10 GROUP BY s.s_name HAVING SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) > 20000;

SELECT c.c_name, SUM(l.l_tax) AS taxe_totale FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE o.o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' GROUP BY c.c_name HAVING SUM(l.l_tax) > 10000;

SELECT s.s_name, SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS stoc_curent FROM supplier s INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE p.p_mfgr = 'Manufacturer#1' GROUP BY s.s_name HAVING SUM(ps.ps_availqty) > 15000;

SELECT c.c_name, SUM(l.l_discount) AS discount_total FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE l.l_returnflag = 'R' GROUP BY c.c_name HAVING SUM(l.l_discount) > 500;

SELECT c.c_name, o.o_orderdate, COUNT(l.l_linenumber) AS expedieri_aer FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE l.l_shipmode = 'AIR' GROUP BY c.c_name, o.o_orderdate HAVING COUNT(l.l_linenumber) > 30;

SELECT c.c_name, MAX(l.l_extendedprice) AS pret_maxim_linie FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'MACHINERY' GROUP BY c.c_name ORDER BY pret_maxim_linie DESC;

SELECT p.p_type, MIN(ps.ps_supplycost) AS cost_minim FROM supplier s INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey GROUP BY p.p_type ORDER BY cost_minim ASC;

SELECT o.o_clerk, MAX(l.l_quantity) AS cantitate_maxima FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY o.o_clerk ORDER BY cantitate_maxima DESC;

SELECT p.p_mfgr, MIN(p.p_retailprice) AS cel_mai_ieftin_retail FROM supplier s INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey GROUP BY p.p_mfgr ORDER BY cel_mai_ieftin_retail ASC;

SELECT l.l_shipmode, MAX(l.l_discount) AS discount_maxim FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY l.l_shipmode ORDER BY discount_maxim DESC;

SELECT p.p_size, MIN(ps.ps_availqty) AS stoc_minim FROM supplier s INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey GROUP BY p.p_size ORDER BY stoc_minim ASC;
SELECT c.c_nation_name AS n_name, MAX(o.o_totalprice) AS comanda_record FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey GROUP BY c.c_nation_name ORDER BY comanda_record DESC;

SELECT s.s_nation_name AS n_name, MIN(ps.ps_supplycost) AS cel_mai_bun_cost FROM supplier s INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey GROUP BY s.s_nation_name ORDER BY cel_mai_bun_cost ASC;

SELECT o.o_orderpriority, MAX(l.l_tax) AS taxa_maxima FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY o.o_orderpriority ORDER BY taxa_maxima DESC;

SELECT p.p_brand, MAX(s.s_acctbal) AS sold_maxim_furnizor FROM supplier s INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE p.p_brand = 'Brand#12' GROUP BY p.p_brand ORDER BY sold_maxim_furnizor DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment, o.o_orderdate, o.o_orderpriority, l.l_shipmode, l.l_extendedprice, c.c_nation_name, c.c_region_name FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'AUTOMOBILE' AND o.o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' AND l.l_shipmode = 'AIR' AND c.c_region_name = 'EUROPE' ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC, l.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_acctbal, o.o_orderdate, o.o_totalprice, l.l_returnflag, l.l_discount, c.c_nation_name, c.c_region_name FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'F' AND l.l_returnflag = 'R' AND l.l_discount > 0.07 AND c.c_region_name = 'ASIA' ORDER BY l.l_discount DESC, o.o_totalprice DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment, o.o_orderdate, o.o_orderpriority, l.l_shipmode, l.l_quantity, c.c_nation_name, c.c_region_name FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' AND l.l_shipmode = 'SHIP' AND o.o_orderdate > '1997-01-01' AND c.c_region_name = 'AMERICA' ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC, l.l_quantity DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, o.o_orderdate, o.o_orderpriority, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_shipmode, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE o.o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' AND l.l_shipmode = 'AIR' AND s.s_acctbal > 5000 ORDER BY l.l_extendedprice DESC, o.o_orderdate DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, o.o_orderdate, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount, s.s_name, s.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE s.s_nation_name = 'GERMANY' AND l.l_discount > 0.05 AND o.o_orderstatus = 'F' ORDER BY l.l_extendedprice DESC, o.o_orderdate ASC;

SELECT c.c_name, s.s_name, o.o_orderdate, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_shipmode, c.c_nation_name AS nat_client, s.s_nation_name AS nat_furnizor, c.c_region_name AS regiune FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE c.c_region_name = s.s_region_name AND c.c_region_name = 'EUROPE' AND l.l_shipmode = 'RAIL' ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC, l.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, s.s_name, o.o_orderdate, o.o_orderpriority, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_returnflag, c.c_nation_name AS nat_client, s.s_nation_name AS nat_furnizor FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE c.c_nation_name = 'FRANCE' AND s.s_nation_name = 'GERMANY' AND o.o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC, l.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, o.o_orderdate, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_quantity, p.p_name, p.p_type, c.c_nation_name, c.c_region_name FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE p.p_type LIKE '%BRASS%' AND c.c_region_name = 'MIDDLE EAST' AND l.l_quantity > 20 ORDER BY l.l_extendedprice DESC, o.o_orderdate ASC;

SELECT c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal, o.o_orderdate, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_shipmode, c.c_nation_name AS nat_client, c.c_region_name FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'HOUSEHOLD' AND c.c_region_name = 'AFRICA' AND s.s_acctbal > 7000 AND l.l_shipmode = 'TRUCK' ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC, l.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT c.c_name, s.s_name, o.o_orderdate, o.o_orderpriority, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_shipmode, c.c_nation_name AS nat_client, s.s_nation_name AS nat_furnizor, c.c_region_name AS regiune_comuna FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE c.c_region_name = s.s_region_name AND c.c_region_name = 'AMERICA' AND o.o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT','2-HIGH') AND l.l_shipmode IN ('AIR','RAIL') ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC, l.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT c.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, o.o_orderstatus, COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS nr_comenzi FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE o.o_orderstatus IN ('F','O') GROUP BY c.c_nation_name, o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY c.c_nation_name ASC, nr_comenzi DESC;

SELECT c.c_region_name AS regiune_client, l.l_shipmode, COUNT(*) AS nr_linii FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE l.l_shipmode IN ('AIR','RAIL','TRUCK','SHIP') GROUP BY c.c_region_name, l.l_shipmode ORDER BY c.c_region_name ASC, nr_linii DESC;

SELECT s.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, p.p_type, COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS nr_furnizori FROM supplier s INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE p.p_type LIKE '%STEEL%' OR p.p_type LIKE '%BRASS%' GROUP BY s.s_nation_name, p.p_type ORDER BY s.s_nation_name ASC, nr_furnizori DESC;

SELECT s.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, o.o_orderpriority, COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS nr_comenzi FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE o.o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT','2-HIGH','3-MEDIUM') GROUP BY s.s_region_name, o.o_orderpriority ORDER BY s.s_region_name ASC, nr_comenzi DESC;

SELECT s.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, p.p_brand, COUNT(DISTINCT p.p_partkey) AS nr_piese FROM supplier s INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE p.p_brand IN ('Brand#12','Brand#23','Brand#34','Brand#45') GROUP BY s.s_region_name, p.p_brand ORDER BY s.s_region_name ASC, nr_piese DESC;

SELECT c.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, c.c_mktsegment, COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS nr_clienti_activi FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1997-12-31' GROUP BY c.c_nation_name, c.c_mktsegment ORDER BY c.c_nation_name ASC, nr_clienti_activi DESC;

SELECT c.c_region_name AS regiune_client, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) AS an_comanda, COUNT(*) AS nr_linii_returnate FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE l.l_returnflag = 'R' GROUP BY c.c_region_name, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) ORDER BY c.c_region_name ASC, an_comanda ASC;

SELECT c.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, s.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS nr_clienti, COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS nr_furnizori FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE c.c_nation_name IN ('FRANCE','GERMANY') AND s.s_nation_name IN ('FRANCE','GERMANY') GROUP BY c.c_nation_name, s.s_nation_name ORDER BY c.c_nation_name ASC, s.s_nation_name ASC;

SELECT s.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, p.p_container, p.p_size, COUNT(DISTINCT p.p_partkey) AS nr_piese FROM supplier s INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE p.p_size BETWEEN 5 AND 15 GROUP BY s.s_region_name, p.p_container, p.p_size ORDER BY s.s_region_name ASC, nr_piese DESC;

SELECT c.c_region_name AS regiune_client, s.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS nr_comenzi, COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS nr_clienti FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1994-01-01' AND '1997-12-31' GROUP BY c.c_region_name, s.s_region_name ORDER BY c.c_region_name ASC, nr_comenzi DESC;

SELECT c.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) AS an_comanda, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1993-01-01' AND '1997-12-31' GROUP BY c.c_nation_name, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) ORDER BY c.c_nation_name ASC, an_comanda ASC;

SELECT c.c_region_name AS regiune_client, l.l_shipmode, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS valoare_neta_totala FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE l.l_shipmode IN ('AIR','RAIL','TRUCK','SHIP','MAIL') GROUP BY c.c_region_name, l.l_shipmode ORDER BY c.c_region_name ASC, valoare_neta_totala DESC;

SELECT s.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, l.l_linestatus, SUM(l.l_tax) AS total_taxe FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey INNER JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey WHERE l.l_linestatus IN ('F','O') GROUP BY s.s_nation_name, l.l_linestatus ORDER BY s.s_nation_name ASC, total_taxe DESC;

SELECT s.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, o.o_orderpriority, SUM(l.l_discount) AS total_discount FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE o.o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT','2-HIGH','3-MEDIUM','4-NOT SPECIFIED','5-LOW') GROUP BY s.s_region_name, o.o_orderpriority ORDER BY s.s_region_name ASC, total_discount DESC;

SELECT c.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, s.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE  EXTRACT (YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) BETWEEN 1995 AND 1996 GROUP BY c.c_nation_name, s.s_nation_name ORDER BY total_facturat DESC;

SELECT c.c_region_name AS regiune_client, s.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS valoare_neta_totala FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'F' GROUP BY c.c_region_name, s.s_region_name ORDER BY valoare_neta_totala DESC;

SELECT s.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, p.p_brand, SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_cantitate, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey INNER JOIN part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE p.p_brand IN ('Brand#12','Brand#23','Brand#34','Brand#45','Brand#55') GROUP BY s.s_nation_name, p.p_brand ORDER BY s.s_nation_name ASC, total_facturat DESC;

SELECT c.c_mktsegment, s.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, SUM(l.l_tax) AS total_taxe, SUM(l.l_discount) AS total_discount FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE l.l_returnflag = 'R' GROUP BY c.c_mktsegment, s.s_region_name ORDER BY c.c_mktsegment ASC, total_taxe DESC;

SELECT c.c_region_name AS regiune_client, p.p_type, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE p.p_type LIKE 'STANDARD%' OR p.p_type LIKE 'PROMO%' GROUP BY c.c_region_name, p.p_type ORDER BY c.c_region_name ASC, total_facturat DESC;

SELECT c.c_region_name AS regiune_client, s.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) AS an_comanda, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat, SUM(l.l_tax) AS total_taxe, SUM(l.l_discount) AS total_discount FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1993-01-01' AND '1997-12-31' GROUP BY c.c_region_name, s.s_region_name, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) ORDER BY c.c_region_name ASC, s.s_region_name ASC, an_comanda ASC;

SELECT c.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'F' GROUP BY c.c_nation_name HAVING SUM(l.l_extendedprice) > 5000000 ORDER BY total_facturat DESC;

SELECT c.c_region_name AS regiune_client, COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS nr_comenzi_urgente FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE o.o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' GROUP BY c.c_region_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) > 500 ORDER BY nr_comenzi_urgente DESC;

SELECT s.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, s.s_name, SUM(l.l_tax) AS total_taxe FROM supplier s INNER JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey INNER JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey WHERE l.l_linestatus = 'F' GROUP BY s.s_nation_name, s.s_suppkey, s.s_name HAVING SUM(l.l_tax) > 40 ORDER BY s.s_nation_name ASC, total_taxe DESC;

SELECT c.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, s.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS valoare_neta FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE EXTRACT (YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate) BETWEEN 1994 AND 1997 GROUP BY c.c_nation_name, s.s_nation_name HAVING SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) > 1000000 ORDER BY valoare_neta DESC;

SELECT s.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, SUM(l.l_discount) AS total_discount FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE l.l_returnflag = 'R' GROUP BY s.s_region_name HAVING SUM(l.l_discount) > 1000 ORDER BY total_discount DESC;

SELECT s.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, p.p_brand, COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS nr_furnizori FROM supplier s INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE p.p_size BETWEEN 1 AND 20 GROUP BY s.s_region_name, p.p_brand HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) > 3 ORDER BY s.s_region_name ASC, nr_furnizori DESC;

SELECT c.c_region_name AS regiune_client, c.c_mktsegment, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_returnat FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE l.l_returnflag = 'R' GROUP BY c.c_region_name, c.c_mktsegment HAVING SUM(l.l_extendedprice) > 2000000 ORDER BY c.c_region_name ASC, total_returnat DESC;

SELECT c.c_region_name AS regiune_client, s.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, COUNT(*) AS nr_linii_returnate FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE l.l_returnflag = 'R' GROUP BY c.c_region_name, s.s_region_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 500 ORDER BY nr_linii_returnate DESC;

SELECT p.p_type, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat, COUNT(DISTINCT p.p_partkey) AS nr_piese FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE c.c_region_name = 'EUROPE' GROUP BY p.p_type HAVING SUM(l.l_extendedprice) > 1500000 ORDER BY total_facturat DESC;

SELECT c.c_region_name AS regiune_client, s.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat, SUM(l.l_tax) AS total_taxe, COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS nr_comenzi FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1993-01-01' AND '1997-12-31' GROUP BY c.c_region_name, s.s_region_name HAVING SUM(l.l_extendedprice) > 10000000 AND COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) > 1000 ORDER BY total_facturat DESC;

SELECT c.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, l.l_shipmode, MAX(l.l_extendedprice) AS pret_maxim, MIN(l.l_extendedprice) AS pret_minim FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE l.l_shipmode IN ('AIR','RAIL','TRUCK','SHIP','MAIL','FOB','REG AIR') GROUP BY c.c_nation_name, l.l_shipmode ORDER BY pret_maxim DESC;

SELECT c.c_region_name AS regiune_client, o.o_orderpriority, MAX(l.l_quantity) AS cantitate_maxima, MIN(l.l_quantity) AS cantitate_minima FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey WHERE o.o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT','2-HIGH','3-MEDIUM','4-NOT SPECIFIED','5-LOW') GROUP BY c.c_region_name, o.o_orderpriority ORDER BY c.c_region_name ASC, cantitate_maxima DESC;

SELECT s.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, p.p_mfgr, MAX(p.p_retailprice) AS pret_maxim_catalog, MIN(p.p_retailprice) AS pret_minim_catalog FROM supplier s INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE p.p_mfgr IN ('Manufacturer#1','Manufacturer#2','Manufacturer#3','Manufacturer#4','Manufacturer#5') GROUP BY s.s_region_name, p.p_mfgr ORDER BY s.s_region_name ASC, pret_maxim_catalog DESC;

SELECT s.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, p.p_brand, MAX(ps.ps_supplycost) AS cost_maxim_aprovizionare, MIN(ps.ps_supplycost) AS cost_minim_aprovizionare FROM supplier s INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE p.p_size BETWEEN 5 AND 25 GROUP BY s.s_nation_name, p.p_brand ORDER BY cost_maxim_aprovizionare DESC;

SELECT c.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, s.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, MAX(l.l_discount) AS discount_maxim, MIN(l.l_discount) AS discount_minim FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'F' GROUP BY c.c_nation_name, s.s_nation_name ORDER BY discount_maxim DESC, c.c_nation_name ASC;

SELECT c.c_region_name AS regiune_client, p.p_type, MAX(l.l_extendedprice) AS pret_maxim_linie, MIN(l.l_extendedprice) AS pret_minim_linie FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE p.p_type LIKE 'PROMO%' OR p.p_type LIKE 'STANDARD%' GROUP BY c.c_region_name, p.p_type ORDER BY c.c_region_name ASC, pret_maxim_linie DESC;

SELECT c.c_region_name AS regiune_client, s.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, MAX(l.l_tax) AS taxa_maxima, MIN(l.l_tax) AS taxa_minima FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey WHERE o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1994-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'GROUP BY c.c_region_name, s.s_region_name ORDER BY taxa_maxima DESC, c.c_region_name ASC;

SELECT s.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, p.p_container, MAX(ps.ps_availqty) AS stoc_maxim, MIN(ps.ps_availqty) AS stoc_minim FROM supplier s INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE ps.ps_availqty > 0 GROUP BY s.s_region_name, p.p_container ORDER BY stoc_maxim DESC, s.s_region_name ASC;

SELECT c.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, p.p_mfgr AS producator, MAX(l.l_extendedprice) AS pret_maxim_facturat, MIN(l.l_extendedprice) AS pret_minim_facturat FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE p.p_mfgr IN ('Manufacturer#1','Manufacturer#2','Manufacturer#3','Manufacturer#4','Manufacturer#5') GROUP BY c.c_nation_name, p.p_mfgr ORDER BY c.c_nation_name ASC, pret_maxim_facturat DESC;

SELECT c.c_region_name AS regiune_client, s.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, p.p_mfgr AS producator, MAX(l.l_extendedprice) AS pret_maxim, MIN(l.l_extendedprice) AS pret_minim, MAX(l.l_discount) AS discount_maxim, MIN(l.l_discount) AS discount_minim FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey INNER JOIN part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey WHERE o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1993-01-01' AND '1997-12-31' GROUP BY c.c_region_name, s.s_region_name, p.p_mfgr ORDER BY pret_maxim DESC, c.c_region_name ASC;
